chapter_title.en: The Reward of the Night Prayer

text: 1363 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «عَلَيْكُمْ بِصَلاَةِ اَللَّيْلِ فَإِنَّهَا سُنَّةُ نَبِيِّكُمْ وَ أَدَبُ اَلصَّالِحِينَ قَبْلَكُمْ وَ مَطْرَدَةُ اَلدَّاءِ عَنْ أَجْسَادِكُمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1363 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"You must engage in the night prayer (salat al-layl), for it is the tradition (sunnah) of your Prophet and the practice of the righteous before you, and it drives away illness from your bodies."
